title: astripomoea delamereana
intro: Astripomoea delamereana, also known as the Delamere's clock vine or the Delamere's morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in South African folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever. The leaves and stems of the Astripomoea delamereana plant are known to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving coughs and colds. Astripomoea delamereana can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
